data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for purpose-of-use tagging.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of purpose-of-use tagging, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for purpose-of-use tagging but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of purpose-of-use tagging implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify purpose-of-use tagging.
